reviews.review_description:
*Full Video review on my Youtube Channel*

For people who cannot have the opportunity to visit places like  the natural history museum and are interested in animals this is an incredible App. 

With David Attenborough to talk you through everything you go over 9 different items in a brand new way in VR, Holding them your self and learning about each one. 

With added extras for VR  this is a great way to teach about bones and animals without leaving your house.

It is a bit short and would of liked it to be longer, but what it is, is made very well.
Really good but not long enough

I played this back on Rift and love how well it's been ported to Quest! All of the same content is included and it's really interesting interacting with the collection and seeing ancient creatures come to life, with Sir David Attenborough guiding me through it all! 

I particularly like the additional creatures and bonus activities you unlock after viewing each specimen. Viewing a 3D scan of a flea in super-scale is amazing!

While having fun!

Great use of VR technology, this experience is way too short.

Still, what you get is top quality stuff indeed.
